inputs.question: How do code reviews work here?

expected_facts: Small focused pull requests are preferred
Code reviews improve correctness and maintainability
At least one reviewer approval is required before merge
FastAPI was chosen for typed validation

inputs.question: When should an incident be escalated?

expected_facts: High-risk incidents should be escalated early
Escalation paths are defined in incident policy

inputs.question: What rookie mistakes should interns avoid?

expected_facts: Asking too late for help can be a rookie mistake
Strong interns follow team norms and communicate early

inputs.question: Why did we choose RAG over fine-tuning?

expected_facts: RAG was chosen over fine-tuning for knowledge access
Tradeoffs are described in an ADR
Maintainability was part of the decision
